relationship.description: Each store has exactly one address record
manager_id in DEPARTMENT references the EMPLOYEE who is the manager; the referenced employee must belong to the same department

metadata.improvements_made: Added a separate ADDRESS entity to normalize store address details and allow finer granularity. Included email attribute for EMPLOYEE to support additional contact channels. Retained first_name and last_name for clear employee identification. Clarified manager relationship with a constraint that the manager must be an employee of the department. Updated STORE to reference ADDRESS via address_id, preserving the original 1:1 relationship. All original strengths (core entities, manager reference, 1:N relationships) are retained while eliminating redundancy and enhancing extensibility.
